positive: A stylized minimalist illustration of a celestial compass pointing towards a stylized, blooming cosmic lotus flower. The composition should be perfectly centered, featuring thick, elegant line work and strong silhouettes. Use a limited, deep color palette of indigo, gold, and burnt orange, suggesting starlight and ancient wisdom. The style should be sophisticated vector art mixed with ethereal engraving aesthetics, suitable for high-contrast apparel printing. The background should be a simple, subtle gradient or solid color that complements the central elements, ensuring the design pops. Intricate details within the compass and petals should feel balanced and harmonious. Highly detailed, clean lines, graphic design.
negative: blur, noise, text, watermark, signature, messy, abstract, photo, realistic, grainy, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poor composition, gradient background, writing, logos, brand names
